name: io.github.SalesforgeAI/forge-mcp
description: MCP server for Salesforge, Primeforge, Leadsforge, Infraforge, Warmforge, and Mailforge

environmentVariables.name: SALESFORGE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Salesforge (app.salesforge.ai > Settings > API)

environmentVariables.name: PRIMEFORGE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Primeforge (app.primeforge.ai > Settings > API)

environmentVariables.name: LEADSFORGE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Leadsforge (app.leadsforge.ai > Settings > API)

environmentVariables.name: INFRAFORGE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Infraforge (app.infraforge.ai > Settings > API)

environmentVariables.name: WARMFORGE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Warmforge (app.warmforge.ai > Settings > API)

environmentVariables.name: MAILFORGE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Mailforge (app.mailforge.ai > Settings > API)
